settings.title: Settings
settings.romanization_desc: Show romanized lyrics for non-Latin scripts (Japanese, Korean, etc.)
settings.public_profile_desc: Allow anyone to see your profile and public playlists
settings.show_now_playing_desc: Let followers see what you're currently listening to
settings.show_recently_played_desc: Display your recent listening activity on your profile
settings.change_password_desc: We'll send a secure link to your email to set or update your password. If you signed up with Google, this lets you also log in with email and password.
settings.password_email_sent_desc: Check your inbox and click the link to set your new password.
settings.set_password_desc: Create a password for your account so you can also log in manually.
settings.password_too_short: Password must be at least 6 characters
